name: tinyfish-browser
description: Spin up a remote Chromium session via the TinyFish Browser API and get a CDP URL for driving it with Playwright/Puppeteer; sessions auto-expire after about an hour idle.

interface.shortDescription: Spin up a remote Chromium session via the TinyFish Browser API and get a CDP URL for driving it with Playwright/Puppeteer; sessions auto-expire after about an hour idle.
interface.longDescription: Verify TINYFISH_API_KEY, create a session over the API, and drive the returned cdp_url with a DevTools-Protocol client.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use TinyFish Browser safely.
